name: mouse_b2_sine
description: B2 SINE: a tRNA-derived rodent-specific SINE family (~190 bp monomer), distinct from B1 in origin and slightly longer. ~350,000 copies in the mouse genome (~2.4% of genomic DNA). Transcribed by Pol III; many copies retain an internal Pol III promoter. Stress-induced B2 RNAs interact with Pol II during heat shock. Mouse-specific — does not appear in primates.
